requirement_topic.en: SNI route and importer registration via SPPT-SNI and BSN/LSPRO
requirement_topic.zh: 通过SPPT-SNI、BSN与LSPro路径的SNI执行与进口备案
requirement_topic.zht: 透過SPPT-SNI、BSN與LSPro路徑的SNI執行與進口備案

summary.en: Refrigerator importers must satisfy mandatory Indonesian SNI certification pathways. The process is controlled by BSN and Ministry of Industry structures, using accredited LSPro bodies for product testing and issuing SPPT-SNI documents, then affixing the SNI mark under approved conditions.
summary.zh: 冰箱进口企业必须遵守印尼强制SNI认证流程。该流程由BSN与工业部体系管理，通常由具备资质的LSPro机构完成检测并签发SPPT-SNI文件，再在核准条件下使用SNI标志。
summary.zht: 冰箱進口企業必須遵守印尼強制SNI認證流程。該流程由BSN與工業部體系管理，通常由具備資質的LSPro機構完成檢測並簽發SPPT-SNI文件，再在核准條件下使用SNI標誌。

standards_or_laws: BSN SNI certification administration framework for imported household electrical appliances
Kementerian Perindustrian implementation requirements for SNI market access
Regulatory expectation for SPPT-SNI issuance through accredited LSPro

summary.en: China uses domestic CCC and related conformity systems for market launch. While testing evidence from China may aid technical review, it is not automatically treated as an Indonesian SPPT-SNI pathway.
summary.zh: 中国采用CCC及本国合格评定体系办理市场准入。中国检测结果可用于技术参考，但通常不能自动替代印尼的SPPT-SNI程序。
summary.zht: 中國採用CCC及本國合格評定體系辦理市場准入。中國檢測結果可作為技術參考，但通常不能自動替代印尼的SPPT-SNI程序。

standards_or_laws: China CCC conformity-assessment and import model controls
GB safety and performance document framework for domestic product launch

gap.en: Exporters often submit CCC-style files but still need Indonesian scope review, local approval identifiers, and updated model marking approvals. Misalignment is common when labels, importer name, and certificate numbers do not match the SNI filing copy.
gap.zh: 出口商常提交CCC式资料，但仍需印尼范围审查、本地批准编号和最新型号标识文件。常见问题是标签、进口商名称及证书编号与SNI备案不一致。
gap.zht: 出口商常提交CCC式資料，但仍需印尼範圍審查、本地批准編號和最新型號標識文件。常見問題是標籤、進口商名稱及證書編號與SNI備案不一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for targeted refrigerator imports where SNI is required by market-access scope and ministry rules.
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC testing and marks are domestic compliance artifacts and do not remove Indonesia SNI workflow obligations.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Obtain SPPT-SNI documents before physical shipment planning and ensure certificate numbers, model names, and mark placements exactly mirror the Indonesian approval record.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 建议在出运前完成SPPT-SNI文件，确保证书号码、型号名称与标识位置与印尼批准记录完全一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 建議在出運前完成SPPT-SNI文件，確保證書編號、型號名稱與標識位置與印尼批准記錄完全一致。

requirement_topic.en: Importer of record, API-U and NIB responsibilities, and Indonesia port entry records
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商责任、API-U与NIB、以及印尼港口入境记录
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商責任、API-U與NIB、以及印尼港口入境紀錄

summary.en: Import operations require an in-country importer role with clear API-U and NIB alignment for customs and ministry coordination. Typical logistics channels include Tanjung Priok (Jakarta) and Tanjung Perak (Surabaya), and shipment documents should match the approved importer identity and product file.
summary.zh: 进口业务需明确在印尼进口商角色并与API-U及NIB保持匹配，用于海关与主管部门协调。典型报关口岸包括雅加达丹戎普利奥克和泗水丹戎佩拉克，提单与清关文件必须与已批准进口商身份及产品文件一致。
summary.zht: 進口業務需明確在印尼進口商角色並與API-U及NIB保持匹配，用於海關與主管部門協調。典型報關口岸包括雅加達丹戎普利奧克與泗水丹戎佩拉克，提單與清關文件必須與已批准進口商身份及產品文件一致。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Industry and trade-linked importer registration requirements (API-U)
OSS/NIB registration requirement for entities participating in Indonesian import activity
Port-level customs process practices for refrigerated appliances

summary.en: China domestic export flows center on Chinese customs declarations and domestic trading entities. The importer-of-record architecture is not equivalent to Chinese exporter-side customs roles when the destination is Indonesia.
summary.zh: 中国国内外贸流通以中国出口报关和国内贸易主体为核心，目的地进口商角色并非中国出口角色的直接替代。
summary.zht: 中國國內外貿流通以中國出口報關和國內貿易主體為核心，目的地進口商角色並非中國出口主體的直接替代。

standards_or_laws: Chinese customs declaration and trade documentation system for exports
China-side quality and trade control channels

gap.en: Common blockers are missing Indonesian importer identifiers, absent API-U/NIB evidence, or shipment files listing a different consignee than the market-access record. Keep importer, consignee, and model hierarchy synchronized before port filing at Tanjung Priok or Tanjung Perak.
gap.zh: 常见卡点包括缺少印尼进口商身份、未提供API-U/NIB证据，或运单记载收货人与备案不一致。报关前应在丹戎普利奥克或丹戎佩拉克口岸同步核对进口商、收货人和型号树。
gap.zht: 常見卡點包括缺少印尼進口商身份、未提供API-U/NIB證據，或運單記載收貨人與備案不一致。報關前應在丹戎普利奧克或丹戎佩拉克港口同步核對進口商、收貨人和型號樹。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for clearing refrigerators into Indonesia where customs and ministry coordination requires importer-level registration and filing details.
mandatory_status.cn: China customs export paperwork does not replace Indonesia in-country importer registration and API-U/NIB controls.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm importer credentials and consignee identity in the same document set used for SNI filings, and mirror that set against shipment declarations by port before export completion.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请将进口商资质与收货人身份与SNI申报用同一套文件中确认，并在出口完成前将其与各港口报关单一一对应。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請將進口商資質與收貨人身份與SNI申報用同一套文件中確認，並在出口完成前將其與各港口報關單一一對應。
